_comment: Hand-curated overrides applied during the raw → structured pipeline (planned for v0.2 build step). Each key under 'libraries' / 'attractions' / 'passes' overrides the corresponding field after auto-extraction. Use this for: (a) correcting obviously wrong AI/regex extractions, (b) supplying fields the scraper can't see (e.g. extra residency rules buried in a PDF), (c) marking an attraction as 'closed permanently'. The build script will merge this layer LAST so manual edits always win.
